name: Lorazepam
description: Benzodiazepine mai matsakaici. Magani na farko na IV/IM don matsayi na epilepticus da m seizures. Hakanan ana amfani dashi don kwantar da hankali da anxiolysis.
indications: Gudanar da kamuwa da cuta mai tsanani
Damuwa mai tsanani ko tashin hankali
dose: Kamewa: 4 mg IV/IO jinkirin turawa akan 2 min. Maimaita 4 MG a cikin mintuna 5-10 idan an ci gaba da kamawa. IM: 4 MG idan IV ba ya samuwa.
warnings: Yana haifar da baƙin ciki na numfashi -- an shirya kayan aikin BVM da hanyar iska.
Kwanciyar hankali na iya ɗaukar awanni 6-8 -- duba hanyar iska.
Paradoxical tashin hankali zai yiwu, musamman a cikin tsofaffi da yara.

pediatric.dose: 0.05-0.1 mg/kg IV/IM (max 4 mg/dose). Maimaita sau ɗaya a cikin mintuna 5-10 idan an buƙata.
pediatric.note: An fi so fiye da diazepam don sarrafa kamawar IV a cikin yara.

obstetric.note: Ketare mahaifa -- bakin ciki na numfashi na jariri mai yiwuwa. Yi amfani da farfaɗowa a yanayin haihuwa lokacin da fa'idar ta zarce haɗari.

source: JTS CPG / Standard Seizure Management Guidelines
